query: SELECT YEAR(saleDate) as ano, MONTH(saleDate) as mes, COUNT(*) as total_vendas, SUM(salePrice) as valor_total FROM historicalSales WHERE YEAR(saleDate) IN (2024, 2025) GROUP BY YEAR(saleDate), MONTH(saleDate) ORDER BY ano, mes
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3eAQdaRY4zkjYsC.95a35ec57269 --database FWQUTMFHrecTsndnoBiUKo --execute SELECT YEAR(saleDate) as ano, MONTH(saleDate) as mes, COUNT(*) as total_vendas, SUM(salePrice) as valor_total FROM historicalSales WHERE YEAR(saleDate) IN (2024, 2025) GROUP BY YEAR(saleDate), MONTH(saleDate) ORDER BY ano, mes
